summary: Comprehensive testing of registration flow for all user types in Trend Syria app (Arabic). Login button click fix verified - now working correctly. All registration flows tested: buyer, seller, delivery. Backend API tests: 14/16 passed (2 failed due to rate limiting - expected behavior).

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) kicks in after multiple registration attempts - this is expected security behavior

action_items: Consider adding route aliases for /join-as-seller -> /join/seller, /join-as-delivery -> /join/delivery, /join-as-food-seller -> /join/food-seller for better URL consistency

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (14/16 tests passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration flow testing completed. All user types (buyer, seller, delivery) can register successfully. Login button click is now working (was broken in previous iteration). Marketing pages are at /join/seller, /join/delivery, /join/food-seller (not /join-as-*). Rate limiting is active and working correctly.

login_button_click.details: Login button click now works correctly - admin can login by clicking the button (previously only Enter key worked)

buyer_registration.details: Buyer can register with full name (3 parts), phone, password, city. Redirects to homepage after successful registration.

seller_registration.details: Seller can register and is redirected to /seller/documents page to upload business documents

delivery_registration.details: Delivery driver can register and is redirected to /delivery/documents page to upload ID and vehicle documents

food_seller_registration.details: Food seller page at /join/food-seller requires login first, then shows store type selection (food/market)

error_messages.details: Error messages shown for: incomplete name (not 3 parts), duplicate phone number, rate limiting

admin_join_requests.details: Admin can view pending sellers at /admin -> بائعين and pending drivers at /admin -> سائقين

cities_selection.details: All 13 Syrian cities available for selection: دمشق, حلب, حمص, اللاذقية, طرطوس, حماة, دير الزور, الرقة, الحسكة, درعا, السويداء, إدلب, القنيطرة

vehicle_types_api.details: Vehicle types endpoint returns: car, motorcycle, electric_scooter, bicycle

seller_types_api.details: Seller types endpoint returns: traditional_shop, restaurant

marketing_pages.details: /join/seller and /join/delivery marketing pages load correctly with benefits, steps, and FAQ sections
